metadata.description: Deploys a Log Analytics custom table (CiscoUmbrellaDNS_CL), a Data Collection Endpoint, and a Data Collection Rule that collects JSON log files (Custom JSON Logs) from VMs running the Azure Monitor Agent. Schema based on the Azure-Sentinel CiscoUmbrellaDNS_table.json.
Name of the existing Log Analytics workspace (in this resource group) that will host the custom table and receive the data.
Name of the Data Collection Endpoint to create. A DCE is required for Custom JSON Logs collection via the Azure Monitor Agent.
Name of the Data Collection Rule to create.
One or more file patterns identifying the JSON (JSONL/NDJSON) log files on the agent machine. Wildcards are allowed in the file name and the first-level folder above it only.

schema.name: [variables('tableName')]
schema.description: The Cisco Secure Access DNS logs show your organization's traffic through the Secure Access DNS resolvers.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time the record was generated (derived from the event timestamp).

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The event time as a Unix epoch value in milliseconds.

columns.name: EventDate
columns.description: The date of the DNS event (UTC).

columns.name: EventTime
columns.description: The time of the DNS event (UTC).

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: The type of event, for example: dns.

columns.name: Verdict
columns.description: Whether the request was allowed or blocked.

columns.name: ReturnCode
columns.description: The DNS return code for this request.

columns.name: Domain
columns.description: The domain that was requested.

columns.name: QueryType
columns.description: The type of DNS request that was made.

columns.name: InternalIp
columns.description: The internal IP address that made the request.

columns.name: ExternalIp
columns.description: The external IP address that made the request.

columns.name: RuleId
columns.description: The ID of the access rule when the DNS request is matched by a policy.

columns.name: RuleLabel
columns.description: The label of the access rule that matched the request.

columns.name: RuleTrafficType
columns.description: The traffic type associated with the matched access rule.

columns.name: DeviceId
columns.description: The identifier of the device that made the request.

columns.name: Identities
columns.description: All identities associated with this request.

columns.name: Categories
columns.description: The security or content categories that the destination matches.

columns.name: PolicyCategories
columns.description: The categories matched by policy for this request.

columns.name: AllApplications
columns.description: All applications associated with this request.

columns.name: AllowedApplications
columns.description: Applications that were allowed for this request.

columns.name: BlockedApplications
columns.description: Applications that were blocked for this request.

columns.name: DestinationCountries
columns.description: The countries of the requested destination.

columns.name: DestinationCountryCodes
columns.description: The two-character country codes of the requested destination.

columns.name: DestinationContinents
columns.description: The continents of the requested destination.

columns.name: Threats
columns.description: The threats associated with this request.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(['timestamp']) * 1ms) , Timestamp = tolong(['timestamp']) , EventDate = tostring(['date']) , EventTime = tostring(['time']) , EventType = tostring(['type']) , Verdict = tostring(verdict) , ReturnCode = toint(returncode) , Domain = tostring(domain) , QueryType = tostring(querytype) , InternalIp = tostring(internalip) , ExternalIp = tostring(externalip) , RuleId = tostring(['rule'].id) , RuleLabel = tostring(['rule'].label) , RuleTrafficType = tostring(['rule'].traffictype) , DeviceId = tostring(device.id) , Identities = identities , Categories = categories , PolicyCategories = policycategories , AllApplications = allapplications , AllowedApplications = allowedapplications , BlockedApplications = blockedapplications , DestinationCountries = destinationcountries , DestinationCountryCodes = destinationcountrycodes , DestinationContinents = destinationcontinents , Threats = threats | project TimeGenerated , Timestamp , EventDate , EventTime , EventType , Verdict , ReturnCode , Domain , QueryType , InternalIp , ExternalIp , RuleId , RuleLabel , RuleTrafficType , DeviceId , Identities , Categories , PolicyCategories , AllApplications , AllowedApplications , BlockedApplications , DestinationCountries , DestinationCountryCodes , DestinationContinents , Threats
